# Sarah Chen

Dr. Chen is a senior software engineer at Acme Corp, where she leads the backend platform team. Sarah Chen joined Acme in 2021 after completing her PhD in distributed systems at MIT.

S. Chen is known for her expertise in Python and PostgreSQL. She architected the data pipeline used in the Digital Transformation project.

Sarah mentors junior developers and speaks regularly at PyCon. She reports to James Liu, VP of Engineering at Acme Corp.
